// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using TechCosmos.CombatSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.Core.Runtime;
using {{HERO_NAMESPACE}};
using UnityEngine;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    [DisallowMultipleComponent]
    public sealed class GameEntityBridge : MonoBehaviour, IDamageable, IHealable
    {
        [SerializeField] private {{HERO_TYPE}} hero;

        public EntityHandle Handle { get; private set; }

        private void Awake()
        {
            if (hero == null)
                hero = GetComponent<{{HERO_TYPE}}>();

            if (hero == null)
            {
                Debug.LogError($"[GameEntityBridge] {name} 缺少 {{HERO_TYPE}}。");
                return;
            }

            if (!GameCompositionRoot.IsInitialized)
                GameCompositionRoot.Initialize();

            Handle = GameCompositionRoot.EntityRegistry.Register(this, transform, this, this);
        }

        private void OnDestroy()
        {
            if (GameCompositionRoot.IsInitialized && Handle.IsValid)
                GameCompositionRoot.EntityRegistry.Unregister(Handle);
        }

        EntityHandle IDamageable.Handle => Handle;

        EntityHandle IHealable.Handle => Handle;

        public CombatResult ApplyDamage(in DamageRequest request)
        {
            if (hero == null)
                return CombatResult.Rejected(CombatOutcome.Invalid, request.amount, "Missing hero");

            hero.ReceiveDamage(request.amount);
            return CombatResult.Applied(request.amount, request.amount);
        }

        public CombatResult ApplyHeal(in HealRequest request)
        {
            if (hero == null)
                return CombatResult.Rejected(CombatOutcome.Invalid, request.amount, "Missing hero");

            hero.Heal(request.amount);
            return CombatResult.Applied(request.amount, request.amount);
        }

        public {{HERO_TYPE}} Hero => hero;
    }
}
